commands: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.public.yml down --remove-orphans || true

if docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 test -d /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend; then echo 'Site frontend already exists'; else docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench new-site frontend --no-mariadb-socket --admin-password '$ADMIN_PASSWORD' --mariadb-root-password '$DB_ROOT_PASSWORD' --mariadb-user-host-login-scope='%'"; fi
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend install-app erpnext || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend migrate"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench use frontend"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend set-config host_name http://44.198.225.186"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend add-domain 44.198.225.186 || true"
